hook: Some snakes can glide through the air.
core_fact: Flying snakes flatten their bodies and undulate in the air, creating lift and control as they glide from trees.
source_policy: Default WAYS frame lane: use Higgsfield free/unlimited models; generate multiple candidates; no metered/paid credits without explicit approval.
sources: Nature Physics: Undulation enables gliding in flying snakes, https://www.nature.com/articles/s41567-020-0935-4

beats.voiceover: Some snakes can glide through the air.
beats.caption: Some snakes can glide through the air
beats.visual: snake launching from tree branch into open air, instantly readable

beats.caption: no wings
beats.visual: clear side view of snake body in air, no wings, tree background

beats.voiceover: They flatten their body like a long moving airfoil.
beats.caption: they flatten their body
beats.visual: body visibly wider/flatter, simple profile transformation with no labels

beats.voiceover: Then they wave side to side while falling forward.
beats.caption: they wave side to side
beats.visual: S-shaped snake gliding path through air

beats.voiceover: That motion helps them steer from one tree to another.
beats.caption: steering tree to tree
beats.visual: snake gliding toward another branch, clear destination

status_column: Gate 2 Plate QC - Higgsfield v02 source candidates ready for human review
blocking_gate: Gate 2 - Human approve/deny Higgsfield v02 plates

rework_reason: Concept/procedural plates are clear, but local Comfy candidates are not final source-pass: action still reads too much like snakes in branches, not guaranteed gliding.

must_fix: premium source plates must clearly show airborne gliding snake, not branch camouflage
avoid multiple snakes or ambiguous vines
first frame must read instantly as snake leaving a tree branch
every beat must be understandable without captions
no render until premium source contact sheet passes phone-size review

rework_artifacts.agent_note: Generated Higgsfield v02 reference-guided sweep. Best source-plate candidates: ref_tree_to_tree_01 for flattened/ribbon body; ref_flatten_01 for open-air hero. Ready for Josh Gate 2 approve/deny.
